name: Basic Flowchart
description: Simple top-to-bottom flowchart with decision branching
code:
graph TB
  A[Start] --> B{Decision}
  B -->|Yes| C[Process A]
  B -->|No| D[Process B]
  C --> E[End]
  D --> E

name: Left-to-Right Flow
description: Horizontal flowchart showing a CI/CD pipeline
code:
graph LR
  A[Code Push] --> B[Build]
  B --> C{Tests Pass?}
  C -->|Yes| D[Deploy Staging]
  D --> E[Integration Tests]
  E --> F[Deploy Production]
  C -->|No| G[Notify Team]

name: Subgraph Clusters
description: Flowchart with grouped subgraphs for architecture diagrams
code:
graph TB
  subgraph Frontend[Client Layer]
    A[Web App]
    B[Mobile App]
  end
  subgraph Backend[API Layer]
    C[Auth Service]
    D[Data Service]
  end
  subgraph Data[Data Layer]
    E[(PostgreSQL)]
    F[(Redis)]
  end
  A --> C
  B --> C
  A --> D
  B --> D
  C --> E
  D --> E
  D --> F

name: Basic Sequence
description: Simple request-response sequence diagram
code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Client
  participant Server
  participant DB
  Client->>Server: GET /api/users
  Server->>DB: SELECT * FROM users
  DB-->>Server: User rows
  Server-->>Client: 200 OK + JSON

name: OAuth Flow
description: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow
code:
sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant Browser
  participant Client
  participant AuthServer
  participant ResourceServer
  User->>Browser: Login
  Browser->>AuthServer: /authorize
  AuthServer-->>Browser: Login page
  User->>AuthServer: Credentials
  AuthServer-->>Browser: Auth code
  Browser->>Client: Auth code
  Client->>AuthServer: Exchange code for token
  AuthServer-->>Client: Access token
  Client->>ResourceServer: API call + token
  ResourceServer-->>Client: Protected data
  Client-->>Browser: Display data

name: Error Handling
description: Sequence diagram with error/retry logic
code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Client
  participant S as Server
  participant D as Database
  C->>S: Request
  S->>D: Query
  D-->>S: Timeout!
  S->>D: Retry query
  D-->>S: Success
  S-->>C: 200 OK
  Note over S: Max 3 retries

name: Class Diagram
description: UML class diagram with inheritance and composition

name: Order State Machine
description: State diagram for an order lifecycle
code:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Pending
  Pending --> Processing : Submit
  Processing --> Shipped : Ship
  Shipped --> Delivered : Deliver
  Delivered --> [*]
  Processing --> Cancelled : Cancel
  Pending --> Cancelled : Cancel
  Cancelled --> [*]

name: Database ER Diagram
description: Entity-relationship diagram for a blog database

name: Project Gantt Chart
description: Gantt chart for a project sprint timeline
code:
gantt
  title Sprint 12
  dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
  section Planning
    Backlog grooming   :a1, 2026-07-01, 2d
    Sprint planning    :a2, after a1, 1d
  section Development
    Feature A          :b1, after a2, 5d
    Feature B          :b2, after a2, 4d
    Bug fixes          :b3, after b1, 2d
  section Review
    Code review        :c1, after b3, 2d
    QA testing         :c2, after b3, 3d
    Deploy to prod     :c3, after c2, 1d

name: Pie Chart
description: Simple pie chart for time allocation breakdown
code:
pie title Time Spent in Sprint
  "Coding" : 45
  "Meetings" : 15
  "Code Review" : 20
  "Testing" : 12
  "Documentation" : 8

name: Mind Map
description: Mind map for brainstorming a tech stack
code:
mindmap
  root((Tech Stack))
    Frontend
      React
      TypeScript
      Tailwind CSS
    Backend
      Node.js
      Python
      Go
    Database
      PostgreSQL
      Redis
      MongoDB
    Infra
      Docker
      Kubernetes
      AWS

name: Architecture Diagram
description: Mermaid architecture-beta diagram for cloud infrastructure
code:
architecture-beta
    group api(cloud)[API Gateway]

    service db(database)[Database] in api
    service cache(disk)[Redis Cache] in api
    service server(server)[App Server] in api
    service queue(server)[Message Queue] in api

    db:L -- R:server
    cache:T -- B:server
    queue:R -- L:server

name: Git Branching
description: Git graph showing a feature branch workflow
code:
gitGraph
  commit id: "init"
  commit id: "setup"
  branch develop
  checkout develop
  commit id: "feat-1"
  commit id: "feat-2"
  checkout main
  commit id: "hotfix"
  checkout develop
  merge main id: "merge-hotfix"
  checkout main
  merge develop id: "release" tag: "v1.0"

name: Data Pipeline
description: Data processing pipeline with parallel branches
code:
graph TB
  A[Raw Data] --> B[Validate]
  B --> C[Transform]
  C --> D[Enrich]
  C --> E[Aggregate]
  D --> F[Merge]
  E --> F
  F --> G[Load to DW]
  G --> H[Dashboard]

name: WebSocket Chat
description: WebSocket connection lifecycle for a real-time chat app

name: Traffic Light
description: Traffic light state machine with timed transitions
code:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Red
  Red --> Green : timer (30s)
  Green --> Yellow : timer (10s)
  Yellow --> Red : timer (5s)
  note right of Red : Stop
  note right of Green : Go
  note right of Yellow : Caution

name: E-Commerce Schema
description: Entity-relationship diagram for an e-commerce platform
code:
erDiagram
  CUSTOMERS {
    int id PK
    string name
    string email
  }
  PRODUCTS {
    int id PK
    string name
    decimal price
    int stock
  }
  ORDERS {
    int id PK
    int customer_id FK
    datetime order_date
    string status
  }
  ORDER_ITEMS {
    int id PK
    int order_id FK
    int product_id FK
    int quantity
  }
  CUSTOMERS ||--o{ ORDERS : places
  ORDERS ||--o{ ORDER_ITEMS : contains
  PRODUCTS ||--o{ ORDER_ITEMS : included

name: Histogram
description: Bar histogram showing incident frequency by type
code:
xychart-beta
  title "Incident Frequency by Type"
  x-axis [Phishing, Ransomware, DDoS, Insider, Malware]
  y-axis "Number of Incidents" 0 --> 50
  bar [35, 12, 28, 8, 42]

name: Line Chart
description: Line chart tracking request latency over time
code:
xychart-beta
  title "Request Latency (ms)"
  x-axis [Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, Sun]
  y-axis "Latency (ms)" 0 --> 500
  line [120, 135, 148, 130, 155, 98, 90]

name: Filesystem Tree
description: Directory structure with file/folder icons
code:
treeView-beta
    my-project/
        src/
            components/

                Modal.js
            pages/

                about.js
            styles/
                global.css
        docs/

            CHANGELOG.md
        static/
            images/
            fonts/
        package.json
        tsconfig.json
        .eslintrc

    CEO ## Chief Executive Officer
        CTO ## Chief Technology Officer
            Engineering ## 12 engineers
                Frontend Team

                DevOps
            QA ## 4 testers
                Manual QA
                Automation

            HR
        COO ## Chief Operating Officer
            Operations
            Sales

name: Developer Skills
description: Radar chart comparing skill levels across technologies

name: Project Health
description: Radar chart measuring project dimensions
code:
radar-beta
  title Project Health Score
  axis Performance, Security, Maintainability, Test Coverage, Documentation, DX
  curve "Q1" {65, 80, 70, 55, 40, 75}
  curve "Q2" {80, 85, 78, 72, 60, 82}
  showLegend true
  max 100
  ticks 5
